---
title: "Data Quality"
format: html
---

There are lots of different ways to assess data quality, and different strategies for what to do with this information.

## Measures of response quality

-   Speeding: Participants complete the study too quickly, indicating they may not have provided meaningful answers [@zhang2014].

-   Straightlining: Participants have selected the same answer repeatedly across a series of questions, indicating they may not have provided meaningful answers. This measure tends to be associated with speeding behaviour [@zhang2014].
